creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is more a question for the appropriate mailinglist, for example 
questions@freebsd.org. 

See 
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/faq/admin.html#FORGOT-ROOT-PW 
on how to resolve it. 

(If the technician doesn't know this, he will have a hard time 
fixing the rest also)
